ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the salary record is for */,
  "title_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the title of the employee */,
  "gross_salary" REAL /* Gross salary of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee's direct supervisor */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the employee record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "version"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("title_id") REFERENCES titles ("title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Current budget for the department */,
  "head_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department head */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("head_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "titles" (
  "title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each title */,
  "title_category" TEXT /* Category of the title (e.g., lecturer, professor) */,
  "title_name" TEXT /* Name of the title */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the title */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade level associated with the title */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the title record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the title record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "gross_salary" REAL /* Gross salary of the employee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the salary period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the salary period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the salary record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the salary record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
